other_observers: My self and my husband Al Kogler (Al saw the bird first, I identified it.; Al Kogler
description: This bird was in typical adult plumage. Red "cap" on poll and black "mask" around bill to the eyes and under the chin. Bill was yellow. Heavy streaking on sides. Whitish edging to greater coverts. Back was brown with streaking.   Supporting photographs will be emailed seperately.Behaviors: Sharing a platform feeder with Pine Siskins, American Goldfinches and House finches. Eating niger and sunflower chips.Call: Not heardPlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Connie Kogler, Connie Kogler, Connie Kogler, Connie Kogler, Connie Kogler
